text:
WIC Application | KCDPH
top of page
WIC - Women, Infants & Children
Do you live in Kings County? WIC is here to help!
Before applying, be sure to:
Check if you qualify:
https://myfamily.wic.ca.gov/Home/AmIEligible
Find the closest WIC office near you:
https://myfamily.wic.ca.gov/Home/WICOfficeGrocer#wicLocations
​
Remember, if you have active Medi-Cal, CalFresh (SNAP), or CalWorks, you are qualified for WIC. To apply for Medi-Cal, click here.
https://benefitscal.com/ApplyForBenefits/begin/ABOVR
Military families are able to apply with their LES or W2 along with proof of ID and residency. To learn more, click here.
https://myfamily.wic.ca.gov/Home/MilitaryFamilies#qualify
Sign up for Kings County WIC
Kings County WIC provides healthy foods, nutrition education, breastfeeding support, health care referrals and community resources. Enter your information below and someone will call you to complete your enrollment. To check the status of your application or if you have any questions, call us at 559-582-0180.
​

Thank you for your submission. You should be expecting a call from us in the next few days to finalize your first appointment. For questions, please call (559) 582-0180.
